settings.text: Absorbs light and shows a subtle glow in darker rooms
Slim protective shell for everyday carry
Built for wired and wireless charging

settings.title: Soft night glow
settings.text: Charges from room light or sunlight, then glows gently in the dark.

settings.title: Easy to spot
settings.text: Find your AirPods faster on a nightstand, desk, couch, or bag.

settings.title: Everyday slim
settings.text: A clean protective shell that keeps the pocket feel light.

settings.title: Charging friendly
settings.text: Works with wired and wireless charging without removing the case.

settings.short_description: Glow in the dark. Find it instantly. Carry it anywhere.
settings.details_heading: Ready for the pocket, desk, and dark.
settings.details_text: Nocturne Aura Case adds a low-key glow to the item you already reach for every day. Leave it near a lamp, window, or desk light and the finish stores that light for later.

settings.text: I keep finding my AirPods instantly now, even in a pitch-black room. Game changer.
settings.author: Alex M.

settings.text: It looks premium in daylight and the glow at night is honestly beautiful. Friends always ask about it.
settings.author: Jordan K.

settings.text: Super lightweight, fits perfectly, and the glow is subtle. Love the blue one.
settings.author: Sam T.

settings.heading: People can't stop talking about it

settings.question: How long does the glow last?
settings.answer: After full light exposure, the glow lasts 2-4 hours at its brightest, then gradually fades. A few minutes under any light source recharges it.

settings.question: Which AirPods models does it fit?
settings.answer: The case is compatible with popular AirPods charging cases. Use your Shopify product options or description for exact model compatibility.

settings.question: Does it interfere with wireless charging?
settings.answer: No. The case is designed to work with both wireless and wired charging without removing it.
